description: Häfele Minifix 15 die-cast eccentric-cam connector housing with an open cage, optional seating rim, combination PZ2/flat/SW4 drive, and radial bolt-capture mouth.
source: Häfele UK catalogue 14CFC294.pdf and 14CFC295.pdf, pp. 294--295, supplies seven nominal installation rows; Häfele US P-00861332 item 262.25.035 STEP AP214 anchors one 19 mm baseline topology and measured landmarks; cross-SKU cage transforms remain proportion.
